trainers.name: FALKNER
trainers.seenText:
I'm FALKNER, the
VIOLET [POK?]MON GYM\lleader!\pPeople say you can
clip flying-type\p[POK?]MON's wings
with a jolt of\lelectricity?\pI won't allow such
insults to bird\l[POK?]MON!\pI'll show you the
real power of the\pmagnificent bird
[POK?]MON!
trainers.beatenText:
?Darn! My dad's
cherished bird\l[POK?]MON?\pAll right.
Take this.\pIt's the official
[POK?]MON LEAGUE\lZEPHYRBADGE.
trainers.afterText: \x52 received\nZEPHYRBADGE.

trainers.name: WHITNEY
trainers.seenText:
Hi! I'm WHITNEY!\pEveryone was into
[POK?]MON, so I got\linto it too!\p[POK?]MON are
super-cute!\pYou want to bat-
tle? I'm warning\lyou--I'm good!
trainers.beatenText: Sob?\p?Waaaaaaah!\nYou're mean!\pYou shouldn't be\nso serious! You?\lyou child, you!

trainers.name: BUGSY
trainers.seenText:
I'm BUGSY!
I never lose when\pit comes to bug
[POK?]MON.\pMy research is
going to make me\pthe authority on
bug [POK?]MON!\pLet me demonstrate
what I've learned\lfrom my studies.
trainers.beatenText:
Whoa, amazing!
You're an expert\lon [POK?]MON!\pMy research isn't
complete yet.\pOK, you win. Take
this BADGE.
trainers.afterText: \x52 received\nHIVEBADGE.

trainers.name: MORTY
trainers.seenText:
Good of you to
have come.\pHere in ECRUTEAK,
[POK?]MON have been\lrevered.\pIt's said that a
rainbow-colored\p[POK?]MON will come
down to appear\pbefore a truly
powerful trainer.\pI believed that
tale, so I have\psecretly trained
here all my life.\pAs a result, I can
now see what\lothers cannot.\pJust a bit more?\pWith a little
more, I could see\pa future in which
I meet the [POK?]MON\lof rainbow colors.\pYou're going to
help me reach that\llevel!
trainers.beatenText: I'm not good\nenough yet?\pAll right. This\nBADGE is yours.
trainers.afterText: \x52 received\nFOGBADGE.

trainers.name: PRYCE
trainers.seenText:
[POK?]MON have many
experiences in\ptheir lives, just 
like we do. \pI, too, have seen
and suffered much\lin my life.\pSince I am your
elder, let me show\lyou what I mean.\pI have been with
[POK?]MON since\pbefore you were
born.\pI do not lose
easily.\pI, PRYCE--the
winter trainer--\pshall demonstrate
my power!
trainers.beatenText:
Ah, I am impressed
by your prowess.\pWith your strong
will, I know you\pwill overcome all
life's obstacles.\pYou are worthy of
this BADGE!
trainers.afterText: \x52 received\nGLACIERBADGE.

trainers.name: JASMINE
trainers.seenText:
?Thank you for
your help at the\lLIGHTHOUSE?\pBut this is dif-
ferent. Please\pallow me to intro-
duce myself.\pI am JASMINE, a
GYM LEADER. I use\lthe steel-type.\p?Do you know about
the steel-type?\pIt's a type that
was only recently\ldiscovered.\p?Um? May I begin?
trainers.beatenText:
?You are a better
trainer than me,\pin both skill and
kindness.\pIn accordance with
LEAGUE rules, I\pconfer upon you
this BADGE.
trainers.afterText: \x52 received\nMINERALBADGE.

trainers.name: CHUCK
trainers.seenText:
There! Scared now,
are you?\pWhat?
It has nothing to\pdo with [POK?]MON?
That's true!\pCome on. We shall
do battle!
trainers.beatenText: Wha? Huh?\nI lost?\pHow about that!\nYou're worthy of\lSTORMBADGE!
trainers.afterText: \x52 received\nSTORMBADGE.

trainers.name: CLAIR
trainers.seenText:
I am CLAIR.\pThe world's best
dragon master.\pI can hold my own
against even the\p[POK?]MON LEAGUE's
ELITE FOUR.\pDo you still want
to take me on?\p?Fine.
Let's do it!\pAs a GYM LEADER,
I will use my full\ppower against any
opponent!
trainers.beatenText: I lost?\pI don't believe\nit. There must be\lsome mistake?
trainers.afterText:
I won't admit
this.\pI may have lost,
but you're still\pnot ready for the
[POK?]MON LEAGUE.\pI know. You should
take the dragon\luser challenge.\pBehind this GYM is
a place called\lDRAGON'S DEN.\pThere is a small
shrine at its\pcenter.
Go there.\pIf you can prove
that you've lost\pyour lazy ideals,
I will recognize\pyou as a trainer
worthy of a GYM\lBADGE!

trainers.seenText: Agility is the key\nattribute of bird\l[POK?]MON.
Kwahaha!\pConfounded by the\nshutters, are we?\pI'll let you in on\na secret if you\lcan beat me!

trainers.name: WILL
trainers.seenText:
Welcome to [POK?]MON
LEAGUE, \x52.\pAllow me to intro-
duce myself. I am\lWILL.\pI have trained all
around the world,\pmaking my psychic
[POK?]MON powerful.\pAnd, at last, I've
been accepted into\lthe ELITE FOUR.\pI can only keep
getting better!\pLosing is not an
option!
trainers.afterText:
Even though I was
defeated, I won't\lchange my course.\pI will continue
battling until I\pstand above all
trainers!\pNow, \x52, move
on and experience\pthe true ferocity
of the ELITE FOUR.

trainers.name: BRUNO
trainers.seenText:
I am BRUNO of the
ELITE FOUR.\pI always train to
the extreme be-\lcause I believe in\lour potential.\pThat is how we
became strong.\pCan you withstand
our power?\pHm? I see no fear
in you. You look\pdetermined. Per-
fect for battle!\pReady, \x52?
You will bow down\pto our overwhelm-
ing power!\pHoo hah!
trainers.afterText: Having lost, I\nhave no right to\lsay anything?\pGo face your next\nchallenge!

trainers.name: KAREN
trainers.seenText: s to test!
trainers.beatenText: Well, aren't you\ngood. I like that\lin a trainer.
trainers.afterText:
Strong [POK?]MON.\pWeak [POK?]MON.\pThat is only the
selfish perception\lof people.\pTruly skilled
trainers should\ptry to win with
their favorites.\pI like your style.
You understand\lwhat's important.\pGo on--the CHAM-
PION is waiting.

trainers.name: KOGA
trainers.seenText:
Fwahahahaha!\pI am KOGA of the
ELITE FOUR.\pI live in shadows,
a ninja!\pMy intricate style
will confound and\ldestroy you!\pConfusion, sleep,
poison?\pPrepare to be the
victim of my sin-\lister technique!\pFwahahahaha!\p[POK?]MON is not
merely about brute\pforce--you shall
see soon enough!
trainers.afterText:
I subjected you to
everything I could\lmuster.\pBut my efforts
failed. I must\lhone my skills.\pGo on to the next
room, and put your\labilities to test!

trainers.name: BROCK
trainers.seenText:
BROCK: Wow, it's
not often that we\pget a challenger
from JOHTO.\pI'm BROCK, the
PEWTER GYM LEADER.\pI'm an expert on
rock-type [POK?]MON.\pMy [POK?]MON are im-
pervious to most\pphysical attacks.
You'll have a hard\ptime inflicting
any damage.\pCome on!
trainers.beatenText:
BROCK: Your [POK?]-
MON's powerful at-\ltacks overcame my\lrock-hard defense?\pYou're stronger
than I expected?\pGo ahead--take
this BADGE.
trainers.afterText: \x52 received\nBOULDERBADGE.

trainers.name: MISTY
trainers.seenText:
MISTY: I was ex-
pecting you, you\lpest!\pYou may have a
lot of JOHTO GYM\pBADGES, but you'd
better not take me\ltoo lightly.\pMy water-type
[POK?]MON are tough!
trainers.beatenText:
MISTY: You really
are good?\pI'll admit that
you are skilled?\pHere you go. It's
CASCADEBADGE.
trainers.afterText: \x52 received\nCASCADEBADGE.

trainers.name: LT.SURGE
trainers.seenText:
SURGE: Hey, you
little tyke!\pI have to hand it
to you. It may not\pbe very smart to
challenge me, but\lit takes guts!\pWhen it comes to
electric [POK?]MON,\lI'm number one!\pI've never lost on
the battlefield.\pI'll zap you just
like I did my\lenemies in war!
trainers.beatenText: SURGE: Arrrgh!\nYou are strong!\pOK, kid. You get\nTHUNDERBADGE!
trainers.afterText: \x52 received\nTHUNDERBADGE.

trainers.name: MARC
trainers.seenText: Let me see how\nmuch you trust\lyour [POK?]MON.

trainers.name: RICH
trainers.seenText: Do I know the\npassword?\pMaybe.\pBut no weakling's\ngoing to get it!

trainers.name: ERIKA
trainers.seenText:
ERIKA: Hello?
Lovely weather,\pisn't it?
It's so pleasant?\p?I'm afraid I may
doze off?\pMy name is ERIKA.
I am the LEADER of\lCELADON GYM.\p?Oh? All the way
from JOHTO, you\lsay? How nice?\pOh. I'm sorry, I
didn't realize\pthat you wished to
challenge me.\pVery well, but I
shall not lose.
trainers.beatenText:
ERIKA: Oh!
I concede defeat?\pYou are remarkably
strong?\pI shall give you
RAINBOWBADGE?
trainers.afterText: \x52 received\nRAINBOWBADGE.

trainers.name: GORDON
trainers.seenText: Can you inflict\nany damage on our\l[POK?]MON?

trainers.name: SAMUEL
trainers.seenText: I like cute [POK?]-\nMON better than\lstrong [POK?]MON.\pBut I have strong\nand cute [POK?]MON!

trainers.name: JOHNNY
trainers.seenText: ?Sway like leaves\nin the wind?

trainers.name: THEO
trainers.seenText: The ELDER's HM\nlights even pitch-\lblack darkness.
trainers.beatenText: It is my head that\nis bright!

trainers.name: TOBY
trainers.seenText: Hello? Why are you\nstaring at me?\pOh, a battle?

trainers.name: ALICE
trainers.seenText: Fufufu!\pI'm JANINE, the\nGYM LEADER!\pNo, I'm not!\nGotcha, sucker!
trainers.afterText: How will you dis-\ntinguish our real\lLEADER?

trainers.name: CONNIE
trainers.seenText:
JASMINE is this
city's GYM LEADER.\pI mean to bring
her back with me.\pNobody had better
get in my way!

trainers.name: LINDA
trainers.seenText: Fooled you!\nHahaha!
trainers.afterText: Well? Wasn't my\ndisguise perfect?

trainers.name: JANINE
trainers.seenText: Fufufufu?\pI'm sorry to dis-\nappoint you?\pI'm only joking!\pI'm the real deal!\pJANINE of FUCHSIA\nGYM, that's me!
trainers.beatenText: JANINE: You're a\ntough one. You\ldefinitely won?\pHere's SOULBADGE.\nTake it.

trainers.name: CODY
trainers.seenText: I'm confident in\nmy ability to\lraise [POK?]MON.\pWant to see?

trainers.name: MIKE
trainers.seenText: I'm No. 4!\nGetting tired?

trainers.name: KEVIN
trainers.seenText:
But after seeing
how you battle, I\pwant to see how
I'll fare.\pHow about it? Let
me take you on.
trainers.beatenText: I've never had a\nbattle this good!
trainers.afterText: That was a great\nbattle!\pYou and your [POK?]-\nMON are truly out-\lstanding!

trainers.name: LOLA
trainers.seenText: I've been getting\n[POK?]MON data off\pmy radio. I think\nI'm good.

trainers.name: KATE
trainers.seenText: I'm the last in\nline, but I tell\lyou, I'm tough!

trainers.name: JACLYN
trainers.seenText: I'm gonna show my\ngirlfriend I'm hot\lstuff!
trainers.beatenText: I wish you would\nhave lost for me?

trainers.name: BRENDA
trainers.seenText: Do you think a\ngirls-only GYM\lis rare?

trainers.name: BEN
trainers.seenText: You seem to be\ngood at [POK?]MON.\pIf you are, how\nabout giving me\lsome advice?
trainers.beatenText: I see. So you can\nbattle that way.

trainers.name: GRUNT
trainers.seenText: OK! I'm No. 5.\nI'll stomp you!

trainers.name: GRUNT
trainers.seenText: I'm second.\nNow it's serious!

trainers.name: GRUNT
trainers.seenText:
Hey, kid! Me am a
TEAM ROCKET member\lkind of guy!\pCome from another
country, a trainer\lnumber one, me!\pThink I did, if
stop the energy,\pbe big panic for
here people!\pSecret it is my
mission, so tell\lyou I not!\pBut! If win you do
versus me, a man I\pbe and mine secret
to you I tell.\pHey, kid! Battle
begin we do!
trainers.beatenText: Ayieeeh! No, no,\nno, believe it I\lcan't!\pStrong very much\nbe you! Match I am\lnot to you!
trainers.afterText:
OK. Tell you mine
secret will I.\pMACHINE PART steal
by me, hide it I\pdid in GYM of the
CERULEAN.\pInside water put
it I did. Look for\pin water center of
GYM at.\pBut you forget me
not!\pBeat you for sure
will TEAM ROCKET.\pCome from JOHTO
will they, mine\pfriends, yes. Will
revenge they are.

trainers.name: VIRGIL
trainers.seenText: I came to explore\nROCK TUNNEL.

trainers.name: SABRINA
trainers.seenText:
SABRINA: I knew
you were coming?\pThree years ago I
had a vision of\lyour arrival.\pYou're after my
BADGE.\pI don't enjoy bat-
tling, but it's my\pduty as a LEADER
to confer BADGES\pon anyone who has
proven him- or\lherself worthy.\pSince you wish it,
I will show you my\lpsychic powers!
trainers.beatenText:
SABRINA: Your
power?\pIt far exceeds
what I foresaw?\pMaybe it isn't
possible to fully\ppredict what the
future holds?\pOK, you win. You
earned yourself\lMARSHBADGE.
trainers.afterText: \x52 received\nMARSHBADGE.

trainers.name: WADE
trainers.seenText: I'm raising [POK?]-\nMON too!\pWill you battle\nwith me?

trainers.name: HENRY
trainers.seenText: You're headed to\nAZALEA, are you?\pLet my [POK?]MON see\nif you are good\lenough to battle.

trainers.name: GEORGE
trainers.seenText: It's been a while\nsince I last saw\lanother person.\pDon't be shy.\nLet's battle!

trainers.name: DENISE
trainers.seenText: What do you know!\nA visitor!

trainers.name: ERNEST
trainers.seenText: I came through the\ntunnel, but I\pstill have plenty\nof energy left.
trainers.beatenText: Whoa! You've got\nmore zip than me!

trainers.name: STANLY
trainers.seenText:
Yeah, I'm a sail-
or, all right.\pI wasn't goofing
off!\pThis cabin was
vacant, so I just\ltook a quick nap!\pAh, forget it!
Let's battle!
trainers.afterText: Being a sailor, I\nhave to do phys-\lical labor. It's\lexhausting!

trainers.name: DAVE
trainers.seenText: Ah, it's good to\nbe outside!\lI feel so free!
Be prepared for\nanything!\pLet me see if your\n[POK?]MON have been\lraised properly!

trainers.name: LEONARD
trainers.seenText: I can do so much\nwith my [POK?]MON--\lit's super-fun!

trainers.name: ANTHONY
trainers.seenText: My [POK?]MON are\npower packed!

trainers.name: HARRIS
trainers.seenText: Fork over your\ngoodies!

trainers.name: ZEKE
trainers.seenText:
Why do I climb
mountains?\pBecause they're
there.\pWhy do I train
[POK?]MON?\pBecause they're
there!

trainers.name: BLAINE
trainers.seenText:
BLAINE: Waaah!\pMy GYM in CINNABAR
burned down.\pMy fire-breathing
[POK?]MON and I are\phomeless because
of the volcano.\pWaaah!\pBut I'm back in
business as a GYM\pLEADER here in
this cave.\pIf you can beat
me, I'll give you\la BADGE.\pHa! You'd better
have BURN HEAL!
trainers.afterText: \x52 received\nVOLCANOBADGE.

trainers.name: BILL
trainers.seenText: She'll be coming\n'round MT.SILVER\lwhen she comes?\pMT.SILVER is in\nJOHTO, right?

trainers.name: IRWIN
trainers.seenText: Are you alone?\nThen let's battle!

trainers.name: NOB
trainers.seenText: I'll tell you a\nsecret.\pBut first, we\nbattle!

trainers.name: KIYO
trainers.seenText:
Hey!\pI am the KARATE
KING!\pI train alone here
in the dark!\pYou!
Battle with me!\pHwaaarggh!
trainers.afterText:
I? I'm crushed?\pMy training is
still not enough?\pBut a loss is a
loss. I admit it.\pAs proof that you
defeated me, I'll\pgive you a rare
fighting [POK?]MON.

trainers.name: EXECUTIVE
trainers.seenText: We're the KANTO\n[POK?]MON FEDERATION\ltrainer group.\pWe'll drive you\nunder our wheels!

trainers.name: FIDEL
trainers.seenText: The cops shut down\nour UNDERGROUND\pPATH! That really\nfries me!

trainers.name: GREG
trainers.seenText: Hahahah!

trainers.name: KIM
trainers.seenText: We're the KANTO\n[POK?]MON FEDERA-\lTION!\lRight on!

trainers.name: CINDY
trainers.seenText: Whoa! What a\nsurprise!\pI didn't expect to\nsee anyone here!
trainers.afterText: You must be\ngetting tired.

trainers.name: ELLIOT
trainers.seenText: We're fearless\nhighway stars!

trainers.name: BARRY
trainers.seenText: Wahahaha!\pYou betcha!\nI'm JANINE!
trainers.afterText: Hey, you. Was my\ndisguise cute or\lwhat, huh?

trainers.name: QUENTIN
trainers.seenText: I'm really, really\ntough!
trainers.beatenText: I was tough at the\nBATTLE TOWER?
trainers.afterText: Have you been to\nthe BATTLE TOWER?\pI never, ever lose\nthere, but?

trainers.name: TROY
trainers.seenText: Wow. That's a cool\nBICYCLE!

trainers.name: JEFFREY
trainers.seenText: Instead of a bug\n[POK?]MON, I found\la trainer!

trainers.name: LI
trainers.seenText:
So good of you to
come here!\pSPROUT TOWER is a
place of training.\pPeople and [POK?]MON
test their bonds\pto build a bright
future together.\pI am the final
test.\pAllow me to check
the ties between\pyour [POK?]MON and
you!
trainers.afterText:
You and your [POK?]-
MON should have\pno problem using
this move.\pTake this FLASH
HM.

trainers.name: MARGRET
trainers.seenText: Hey! Want to have\na speed battle?

trainers.name: ETHEL
trainers.seenText: My bug [POK?]MON are\ntough. Prepare to\llose!

trainers.name: JOSHUA
trainers.seenText: Psychic power is\nthe power of your\lsoul.
trainers.beatenText: Your soul has more\npower than mine!

trainers.name: CARTER
trainers.seenText: I caught a bunch\nof [POK?]MON. Let me\lbattle with you!

trainers.name: KUNI
trainers.seenText: Bug [POK?]MON evolve\nyoung. So they get\pstronger that much\nfaster.

trainers.name: AMY & MAY
trainers.seenText: I can see it?\pEverything to see\nabout you?

trainers.name: JO & ZOE
trainers.seenText: Bug [POK?]MON are\ncool and tough!\pI'll prove it to\nyou!

trainers.name: BEVERLY
trainers.seenText: [POK?]MON can't do a\nthing if they are\lasleep.\pI'll show you how\nscary that is!

trainers.name: GEORGIA
trainers.seenText: You saved all the\nSLOWPOKE? Whew,\lyou're mighty!\pBut my grown-up\n[POK?]MON are pretty\ltough too!

trainers.name: JAIME
trainers.seenText: You came at just\nthe right time.\pLet's battle.
trainers.afterText:
I met my MEOWTH at
night, right here\lon ROUTE 39.\pI'm not sure why,
but it seems to\plike it when I
train here.\pIt seems to become
friendlier by\ptraining here than
anywhere else.

trainers.name: BLUE
trainers.seenText:
BLUE: Yo! Finally
got here, huh?\pI wasn't in the
mood at CINNABAR,\pbut now I'm ready
to battle you.\p?\pYou're telling me
you conquered all\lthe GYMS in JOHTO?\pHeh! JOHTO's GYMS
must be pretty\lpathetic then.\pHey, don't worry
about it.\pI'll know if you
are good or not by\pbattling you right
now.\pReady, JOHTO
CHAMP?
trainers.beatenText: BLUE: What?\pHow the heck did I\nlose to you?\p?\pTch, all right?\nHere, take this--\lit's EARTHBADGE.
trainers.afterText: \x52 received\nEARTHBADGE.

trainers.name: KEITH
trainers.seenText: Who goes there?\nWhat are you up\lto?
trainers.afterText: Yep, I see nothing\nwrong today. You\pbe good and stay\nout of trouble.

trainers.name: DIRK
trainers.seenText: Danger lurks in\nthe night!
trainers.afterText: You know, night-\ntime is fun in its\lown ways.\pBut don't overdo\nit, OK?

trainers.name: GRUNT
trainers.seenText:
Wow, look at all
those BADGES!\lI'm impressed.\pBut you're not
satisfied by just\pcollecting them,
right?

encounters.name: Fishing - Ocean (New Bark, Ports, Sea Routes)
Fishing - Caves (Dark Cave, Union Cave, Mt. Mortar)
